scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.clean:release: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('release', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main
scripts.test: node --input-type=module -e "import { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'; import { readdirSync } from 'node:fs'; import path from 'node:path'; const files = [...readdirSync('tests').filter((file) => /\\.test\\.(mjs|ts)$/.test(file)).sort().map((file) => path.join('tests', file)), ...readdirSync('electron/mumble').filter((file) => /\\.test\\.ts$/.test(file)).sort().map((file) => path.join('electron/mumble', file))]; const result = spawnSync(process.execPath, ['--import', 'tsx', '--test', ...files], { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.pack: npm run clean:release && npm run build && electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.config.mjs --publish never
scripts.package: npm run clean:release && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --publish never
scripts.package:mac: npm run clean:release && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.mjs --publish never
scripts.package:win: npm run clean:release && npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.mjs --publish never
scripts.package:linux: npm run clean:release && npm run build && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.config.mjs --publish never
